phrases.text_local: Onde fica o bar de petiscos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW BAHR DIH peh-TEESH-koosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Petiscos are traditional Portuguese small plates, often ordered directly at a dedicated counter.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Barra de Petiscos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH BAH-ruh DIH peh-TEESH-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Petiscos Bar.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Petiscos Bar.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH BAH-ruh DIH peh-TEESH-koosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Barra de Petiscos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the petisco bar is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o bar de petiscos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW BAHR DIH peh-TEESH-koosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff typically separate bar service from table service to manage noise and pacing.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Barra de Petiscos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH BAH-ruh DIH peh-TEESH-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Petisco Bar.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Petisco Bar.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH BAH-ruh DIH peh-TEESH-koosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Barra de Petiscos.

phrases.text_local: Conhece algum restaurante típico perto da praça?
phrases.pronunciation: koo-NYEH-sih ahl-GOONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo PEHR-too DUH PRAH-suh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao nosso garçom ou ao chefe de sala; eles conhecem bem as opções locais.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW NAW-soo guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG UHSH awp-SOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask our waiter or the floor manager; they know the local options well.

responses.english: Ask our waiter or the floor manager; they know the local options well.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW NAW-soo guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG UHSH awp-SOHNYSH loo-KEYESH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao nosso garçom ou ao chefe de sala; eles conhecem bem as opções locais.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Barra de Petiscos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH BAH-ruh DIH peh-TEESH-koosh?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portugal, petisco bars are often integrated into the main dining area.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the outdoor terrace is
phrases.text_local: Pode indicar a localização do terraço exterior?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DOO teh-RAH-soo ehsh-tih-REEOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: Algarve restaurants prioritize outdoor seating to take advantage of the mild coastal climate.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o terraço fica no fundo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW teh-RAH-soo FEE-kuh NOO FOONNG-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the terrace is at the back.

responses.english: Good morning, the terrace is at the back.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW teh-RAH-soo FEE-kuh NOO FOONNG-doo.
responses.local: Bom dia, o terraço fica no fundo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the petisco bar is
phrases.text_local: Pode dizer onde é a barra de petiscos?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih dee-ZEHR OHNG-dih EH AH BAH-ruh DIH peh-TEESH-koosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff prefer direct questions about specific areas.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está na sala principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is in the main hall.

responses.english: Good morning, it is in the main hall.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NUH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, está na sala principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main dining room is
phrases.text_local: Qual é o caminho para a sala principal?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL EH AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional venues keep the main dining area distinct for formal seated meals and wine service.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a sala principal é ao fundo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL EH OW FOONNG-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the main room is straight ahead.

responses.english: Good morning, the main room is straight ahead.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH SAH-luh preen-see-PAHL EH OW FOONNG-doo.
responses.local: Bom dia, a sala principal é ao fundo.

likely_response.translation_en: Where can I order the wine? Ask the sommelier.

responses.english: Where can I order the wine? Ask the sommelier.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao garçom ou ao chefe de sala. Eles podem indicar o caminho.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh. EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the waiter or the floor manager. They can show you the way.

responses.english: Ask the waiter or the floor manager. They can show you the way.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh. EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao garçom ou ao chefe de sala. Eles podem indicar o caminho.
